goal: Close all outstanding v3 research branches, run a weak-window repair specialist program on the immutable base, and produce a final v4 verdict before any medium-friction work is unlocked.
global_constraints: active-signal-v1@1 is immutable — never modify the baseline snapshot.
Every research branch must reach a terminal decision (promoted or rejected); no half-open branches allowed.
Previously rejected branches (H1_post_funding_long, H2_expiry_lead_lag, A1_high_iv_long_v1, A1b_high_iv_momentum, A4_wed_afternoon) must not be revived.
Medium-friction wave (B1, B2) is locked unless all five unlock conditions are simultaneously satisfied.
Maximum 2 weak pockets may be selected for specialist repair in a single research cycle.

slices.title: Полностью закрыть A3_broader_cl_transition (только если A2 не promoted)
slices.hypothesis: If A2 was not promoted, drive the backup branch A3 to a terminal decision so it does not remain half-open.
slices.objective: If A2 was not promoted, drive the backup branch A3 to a terminal decision so it does not remain half-open.
success_criteria: A3_broader_cl_transition has a terminal decision: promoted or rejected with documented reason.
evidence_requirements: A3_broader_cl_transition has a terminal decision: promoted or rejected with documented reason.

slices.title: Общий вердикт по low-friction wave
slices.hypothesis: Produce a single hard verdict on whether the low-friction research space is exhausted.
slices.objective: Produce a single hard verdict on whether the low-friction research space is exhausted.
success_criteria: A single, binding low-friction final verdict is recorded with justification.
evidence_requirements: A single, binding low-friction final verdict is recorded with justification.

slices.title: Новая программа v4 — weak-window repair specialists
slices.hypothesis: Test whether targeted repair of the weakest pockets in the immutable base can yield useful improvement, using at most 2 specialist hypotheses.
slices.objective: Test whether targeted repair of the weakest pockets in the immutable base can yield useful improvement, using at most 2 specialist hypotheses.
success_criteria: There is a documented answer: can targeted repair produce anything more useful than the current base, yes or no.
evidence_requirements: There is a documented answer: can targeted repair produce anything more useful than the current base, yes or no.
